steps.title: Tutorial 1/5 - Map Recon
steps.narrative: Open the map panel and review node controllers around SyriaZone and IraqBorder.

steps.title: Tutorial 2/5 - Diplomacy Read
steps.narrative: Check diplomacy panel deltas before committing AP-heavy military actions.

steps.title: Tutorial 3/5 - Battle Report
steps.narrative: Review battle/action logs and confirm control-point changes after each operation.

steps.title: Tutorial 4/5 - Event Reading
steps.narrative: Use the event panel to separate story events from system alerts and spot critical entries first.

steps.title: Tutorial 5/5 - Turn Loop Sync
steps.narrative: Before ending turn: validate AP, resources, diplomacy, and event feedback for a complete decision loop.
